name: Zero
description: The title character. She is a witch, child-like in appearance, but presumably much older. She is proficient in both Sorcery and Magic, having developed the latter. Despite her immense knowledge, she is clueless with regards to basic knowledge, such as the value of gems and monetary transactions. Situations that may normally embarrass others, hold no problem for her. She employed Mercenary, after promising to grant him his true human form.

name: Sana Sunomiya
description: **Height:** 171 cm (5'7") The art club president. She has long hair that frames her face with dark-brown eyes. Her personality is stern and serious based on her interactions with [Senpai](https://anilist.co/character/124697), but she treats him with respect unlike [Nagatoro](https://anilist.co/character/124696). She also bears a resemblance to a female character in one of the manga Senpai wrote. [Sunomiya](https://anilist.co/character/226964/Sunomiya) is her younger cousin.

name: Crimson
description: Crimson is the previous Winged Monarch who betrayed the dragons and tried to kill the Dragon God. Crimson teamed up with Ragna to slay all dragons, himself included.

name: Ichimatsu Matsuno
description: Ichimatsu is the "lone wolf" of the Matsuno brothers. He has an affinity with cats and prefers to spend time with them rather than with people. For this reason, his brothers consider him to be antisocial, but in reality, Ichimatsu has difficulty expressing himself. Of the six brothers, the one he gets along with best is Jyuushimatsu, with whom he has a close relationship. We often see them together, helping each other. name: Karen Aijou
description: The protagonist of the Shōjo☆Kageki Revue Starlight franchise. She is a second-year student from the Actor Training Department at Seisho Music Academy's 99th Graduating Class. She set out on the road to becoming a Stage Girl after being captivated by a performance of "Starlight" she saw as a child. She is always boisterous and cheerful but hates early morning lessons. She joins the mysterious Revue with Hikari Kagura, who crossed fates with her when they were young girls.

name: Miri Unasaka
description: Miri is an innocent girl who is just as energetic and fearless. Her father is a mafia boss and a major broker for a human trafficking organization. Her mother is the mistress of the boss. When she arrives at the hotel in search of her father, she becomes involved in a gunfight and is rescued by Kazuki. She is friendly and refers to Kazuki as "Papa Kazuki" and Rei as "Papa Rei".

name: Youji Itami
description: Itami is an otaku who loves to read doujinshi and online novels. Work is nothing more then something that provides an income source for his interest. Itami is a selfless person, he will help anyone who need help no matter if it's friend or enemy. He also cares about other people who he hasn't met before as seen when he immediately saved a japanese woman who was Zorzal's slave. Itami doesn't like the idea of slavery in Special Region. name: Hanyuu Furude
description: Hanyuu is the mysterious "transfer student" in Matsuribayashi-hen. She has a pair of dark colored horns on her head, one of which is chipped slightly (however, no one seems to notice or mention them, with the exception of Takano, who calls her a "monster"). In fact, she has appeared to Rika all her life, but only in Matsuribayashi-hen and Miotsukushi-hen did she gain the power to interact with others, posing as a distant relative of Rika's and given the name "Hanyuu Furude." She wants Nanako to become her best and closest friend, and is very jealous of Nanako's friendship with Tomoko. name: Yuki
description: Yuki is a former elite assassin who abandons her violent past and asks to be employed as a maid by high school student [Hitoyoshi Yokoya](https://anilist.co/character/321802/Hitoyoshi-Yokoya). Having been raised solely to kill, she possesses overwhelming combat ability—particularly with knives—but lacks basic experience in ordinary daily life. As she adjusts to her new role, she gradually learns about trust, warmth, and what it means to live peacefully.
